creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
flo         2011-09-14 21:42:04 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    UPDATING 
    www/asterisk-stat    Makefile pkg-descr 
  Log:
  - make this port usable again by depending on asterisk16-addons instead of
    asterisk14-addons as asterisk14 has been marked vulnerable for > 8 months
  - fix WWW in pkg-descr
  
  PR:             ports/157620
  Submitted by:   Fumihiko Kimura <jfkimura@yahoo.co.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1141    +19 -1     ports/UPDATING
  1.13      +2 -2      ports/www/asterisk-stat/Makefile
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/www/asterisk-stat/pkg-descr
